name: @enclawed/mcp-caldav
description: Bundled bridge: protocol-level CalDAV MCP server. Translates the MCP tools/call envelope into CalDAV REPORT / PROPFIND / GET against any IETF-compliant CalDAV host (Google, Fastmail, iCloud, Apple, Radicale, self-hosted Baikal). Authenticated by the same app-specific password as the IMAP+SMTP bridge.
